full_text:
Wang Shi 王始
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Shi (王始). Lived in Xiangwu county, a giant told him that “great peace would come”. Wang Shi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
